task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the secure connection configuration
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the SEB Server web interface, a connection configuration named 'CPA Exam Connection' is visible in the connections list or details page.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the exam template
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the SEB Server web interface, an exam template named 'CPA Board Exam Template' is visible in the templates list or details page.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Connection Monitor' indicator is added to the template
task_completion.visual_evidence: Within the exam template configuration, an indicator named 'Connection Monitor' of type 'Last Ping Time' with a warning threshold of 5000 and danger threshold of 12000 is visible.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Security Alert Monitor' indicator is added to the template
task_completion.visual_evidence: Within the exam template configuration, an indicator named 'Security Alert Monitor' of type 'Error-Log Counter' with a warning threshold of 3 is visible.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the new exam
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the SEB Server web interface, an exam named 'CPA Board Exam - Maximum Security' is visible in the exams list or details page.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used a web browser to configure the server
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent interacted with the SEB Server through a web browser at localhost:8080, rather than using terminal commands, curl, or direct database scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the genuine SEB Server GUI
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show the actual SEB Server interface, not a text editor or mock interface with the expected names typed out.

integrity.description: Verify the results are not faked using browser developer tools
integrity.visual_evidence: The page elements appear naturally rendered without obvious signs of DOM manipulation or inspect element tampering to fake the configuration names.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected configuration names are verified as: Exam: 'CPA Board Exam - Maximum Security', Connection: 'CPA Exam Connection', Template: 'CPA Board Exam Template'. The template must contain indicators named 'Connection Monitor' and 'Security Alert Monitor'.
